ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* File type of the resource (e.g., DOCX, PDF, PPTX) */,
  "date_modified" TEXT /* Date the resource was last modified */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the resource has received */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the resource */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the resource was created */,
  "version" INTEGER /* The version number of the resource */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who created or owns the resource */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the resource (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* The size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* The path to the file on the server */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* The number of times the resource has been downloaded */,
  "last_downloaded" TEXT /* The date the resource was last downloaded */,
  "rating" REAL /* The average rating of the resource */,
  "rating_count" INTEGER /* The number of ratings given to the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "contact_person_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the primary contact person for the department */,
  "phone" TEXT /* The phone number of the department */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* The physical or virtual location of the department */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the department was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the department (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_contact_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_person_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the category was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the category (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword_name" TEXT /* Name of the keyword */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the keyword */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the keyword was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the keyword (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_departments" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id", "department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_categories" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_keywords" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id", "keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., team member, administrator, external stakeholder) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the role was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the role (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_department_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the role assignment was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the role assignment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "department_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* The text of the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* The rating value (e.g., 1 to 5) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
